$schema_note: Conforms to ADR-025 + ADR-026 + M5.5 AC #6. 8th canonical D14 cycle JSON. 3rd canonical instance of doc-authoring sub-shape (after D11 visual-identity-v2.mdx cycle 109 + D12 writing-guidelines.mdx cycle 111 pre-S1 substrate; D14 cycle 128 README_STYLE_GUIDE.md = 3rd; advances post-graduation of doc-authoring sub-shape).

content_class_declaration.ceiling_compliance_note: 84 lines sits at lower-end of 80-120 declared band. Reference-dense without bloat: 5 numbered sections + cross-references block + final attribution line. New-artifact class — authoring discipline replaces reduction discipline; line band met.

step_1_capture_state.method: mkdir -p .github/ + design 5-section structure per mission spec + author per persona-led structural pattern
step_1_capture_state.scope_decision: 3rd canonical instance of doc-authoring sub-shape. Companion to writing-guidelines.mdx (general prose) + visual-identity-v2.mdx (visual). Layered README-specific discipline atop general clarity rules. Cross-link to 4 substrate artifacts (writing-guidelines + visual-identity-v2 + m51 cross-target synthesis + aar_decadal_d11). 5 numbered sections: (1) Content-class taxonomy + reduction-ceiling table; (2) Persona-led structural pattern (elevator → problem → personas → solution → reference); (3) Scan-affordance ToC top-of-doc; (4) 5-lens conciseness pass for README-class; (5) Cross-references.

step_2_persona_qa.method: agent-simulated 5-question Q&A — 3 primary personas per mission spec §Scope cycle 128 row. All 3 read writing-guidelines.mdx §1 + visual-identity-v2.mdx §9 (change discipline) before scoring.
step_2_persona_qa.qa_protocol_focus: Q1 Style + Q2 Clarity + Q3 Conciseness + Q4 Bloat + Q5 Comprehension + Q6 Reusability (NEW for cycle 128 since artifact governs future cycles)

persona_consensus.ux_writer: The guide opens with the 3-second framing that explains why it exists. The taxonomy table compresses 4 classes × 4 columns into a single decision-grade artifact. Section 2 persona-led structural pattern is named in 5 steps (matches Rust + Stripe-first-page + Astro + Tailwind + Linear convergence). 5-lens conciseness pass is recapitulated as a checklist applied at Step-6 — exactly the discharge pattern that post-graduated continuous-discipline-overlay. Score 4.75/5.0.
persona_consensus.information_architect: 84 lines in 5 numbered sections + cross-references + attribution. Each section is one decision-class: taxonomy / structure / scan-affordance / validation / cross-links. The companion-document framing in the header tells the reader where this fits in the prose-discipline graph (general writing-guidelines + visual-identity-v2 + this README-class guide). Cross-references at end link to 4 substrate artifacts including the M5.1 synthesis. No structural duplication with writing-guidelines.mdx. Score 5.0/5.0.
persona_consensus.oss_maintainer: .github/ is the conventional location for repo-policy docs (CODEOWNERS, ISSUE_TEMPLATE, README_STYLE_GUIDE). Sitting at .github/README_STYLE_GUIDE.md gives it OSS-convention visibility without polluting the root. The guide explicitly cites M5.4 AAR Finding + M5.5 cycles + M5.1 cross-target synthesis as authority — trust-by-attribution. Update cadence (D17 + D20 decadal AAR or when new LIFT/AVOID precedent surfaces) makes the maintenance contract explicit. Score 4.75/5.0.

step_3_generate_or_regen.decision: NO image generation — D14 is text-only end-to-end; cycle 128 is new-artifact authoring with zero asset gen. Cumulative v8 P5 image-gen ledger UNCHANGED at $1.72 of $50 (3.4%).

step_4_implement.method: 1 mkdir + 1 Write authoring pass. Zero edits to existing files (purely additive new-artifact).
changes_applied: mkdir -p aDNA.aDNA/.github/ — first .github/ directory in this project (OSS-convention location for repo-policy docs)

NEW aDNA.aDNA/.github/README_STYLE_GUIDE.md (84 lines) with: header companion-doc framing + Purpose section (3-second framing + M5.4 AAR + M5.5 cycles attribution + M5.1 cross-target synthesis reference) + §1 Content-class taxonomy with 5-row table (canonical-content 5-20% + adopter-conversion 30-70% + reference 25-35% + nav no-fixed-ceiling + new-artifact bounded-by-spec) + §2 Persona-led structural pattern (5-step sequence: elevator → problem → personas → solution → reference) + §3 Scan-affordance ToC (when > 15 h2; 5 reader-intent buckets; budget +15-20 lines; canonical = cycle 127 README) + §4 5-lens conciseness pass for README-class (recapitulates writing-guidelines.mdx §4 with README-specific discharge) + §5 Cross-references (4 substrate artifacts) + closing attribution (cycle 128 authoring context + maintenance cadence)
lift_precedents_honored: Stripe FIRST-PAGE simplicity: opening 3-second framing answers 'what is this and why would I keep reading?' in one paragraph
Rust persona-paths: companion-document header routes reader to general writing-guidelines OR visual-identity-v2 OR this guide based on what they're authoring
Astro problem-first: each section opens with the decision the section enables, not the abstract concept
Tailwind imperative-clarity: 'Use:' marker in §1 and 'Add a top-of-doc ToC when...' in §3 give actionable decision criteria
Linear voice: 'A reader has three seconds' opener uses present-tense reader-second-person grounding
avoid_precedents_avoided: Marketing-copy excess: zero adjective-stacking; every claim is specific (e.g., '> 15 h2 sections' as threshold, not 'large repositories')
Categorical-hierarchy-only: §2 persona-led structural pattern uses functional sequence (elevator → problem → personas → solution → reference) not abstract category trees
IA-fragmentation: 5 sections + cross-references; no orphaned sub-sub-sub-sections; clarity-checklist applied at Step-6

Agent-onboarding-mixed-with-human-onboarding: this guide is human-author-facing; references writing-guidelines.mdx (human) + visual-identity-v2.mdx (human) only; agent protocol lives in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md which this guide does not duplicate

five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_1_word_count_outliers: PASS — no paragraph exceeds 80 words; longest is §1 paragraph below the table (~50 words)
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_2_top_outlier_anti_bloat_ux_writer_: PASS — applied at authoring time; opener tightened from 'A reader will give you about three seconds before deciding' → 'A reader has three seconds before they decide'
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_4_clarity_checklist_paragraph_scan: PASS — each paragraph passes (i) noun-strong opener, (ii) one idea per sentence, (iii) imperative-or-declarative voice, (iv) no marketing words, (v) no leading 'In order to' constructions
five_lens_conciseness_pass.lens_5_reference_collection_scan: PASS — 4 cross-references validated (writing-guidelines.mdx + visual-identity-v2.mdx + m51_cross_target_synthesis.md + aar_decadal_d11_visual_identity.md); relative paths from .github/ resolve to ../site/src/content/reference/ + ../how/campaigns/campaign_adna_serious_tool_readiness/missions/artifacts/
